messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0035",
  "title": "“放置为表、MMO为里“，并通过IP联动将两者紧密藕合",
  "page_index": 33,
  "page_range": "33-34"
}

Section text:
“放置为表、MMO为里“，并通过IP联动将两者紧密藕合
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制。
《杖剑传说》公测仅半年多就已实装了多个联动活动
《杖剑传说》在表层体验上，采用竖屏设计，主打“睡觉也能变强”的经典放置逻辑，以及探索地图、触发随机事件的轻度解谜玩法，极大降低了日常参与门槛。其核心的深层体
验在于将MMORPG内核巧妙的编织进放置玩法的框架中。首先，游戏构建了一套深度策略性的战斗与养成体系。战斗采用半即时指令队列，玩家需要预先搭配8个主动与被动技
能，策略核心在于技能组合与装备词条的BD构建，数百个技能形成的组合搭配从根源上保证了玩法的长期可探索性。其次，游戏保留了MMO的核心社交驱动。虽然个人放置挂
机完全独立，但高收益的副本挑战鼓励甚至依赖玩家组队进行。游戏中“大佬带本”文化普遍，结合公会系统，成功复刻了传统MMO中基于协作的社交乐趣与归属感，这是保障
留存与流水的关键所在。另一方面值得注意的是，《杖剑传说》在上线之后保持了高频的IP联动，平均每2个月便有一次新的联动活动上线，且这些IP都更偏向于核心二次元受众。
同时得益于游戏纯2D的小清新美术风格在与二次元IP结合时拥有高适配性和低违和感，使得联动内容能快速落地并有效转化IP粉丝。
杖剑传说 x 蔬菜精灵
公测同步开启联动
杖剑传说 x 为美好的世界献上祝福
公测2个月后
杖剑传说 x 洛天依 x 言和
公测4个月后
杖剑传说 x 罗小黑战记2
公测6个月后
© 2026 DianDian.All Rights Reserved.
34

message.content:
This section answers retrieval queries regarding the mobile game 《杖剑传说》, structured around the following dimensions:

- **Topics & Definitions:** Explains the “放置为表、MMO为里” (idle surface, MMO core) design philosophy, defining how vertical idle progression and light exploration/puzzle mechanics lower daily engagement barriers while embedding traditional MMORPG depth.
- **Entities & Dates:** Identifies the game 《杖剑传说》 and its post-public-beta IP collaboration timeline: 蔬菜精灵 (launch sync), 为美好的世界献上祝福 (2 months post-launch), 洛天依 x 言和 (4 months post-launch), and 罗小黑战记2 (6 months post-launch). Notes the game has been in public beta for over half a year.
- **Procedures & Mechanics:** Details gameplay loops including semi-real-time command queue combat, pre-configuration of 8 active/passive skills, equipment affix BD (build) construction, and the social progression path (independent idle grinding → team-dependent high-yield dungeons → guild participation → “veteran carry” culture).
- **Claims & Metrics:** Asserts that MMO-style collaborative social systems are the primary drivers of player retention and revenue. Claims the pure 2D art style ensures high compatibility with ACG IPs, enabling rapid content deployment and effective fan conversion. Cites metrics: average collab frequency of every 2 months, 8 skill slots, and hundreds of skill combinations ensuring long-term explorability.
- **Tables/Figures & Evidence Types:** Presents a chronological collaboration timeline table/figure mapping IP names to rollout intervals. Evidence is categorized as analytical industry research and gameplay feature breakdown, sourced from 点点数据 (DianDian Data) self-research and visualization.

         - Social: Retains MMO social drive. Independent idle grinding, but high-yield dungeons encourage/require teaming. "Veterans carry runs" culture, guild system, replicates traditional MMO collaborative social fun/belonging. Key for retention & revenue.
       - IP Collaborations: High frequency post-launch, avg. every 2 months. Targets core ACG (2D/anime) audience. Pure 2D fresh art style has high compatibility/low dissonance with ACG IPs, enabling fast deployment & effective fan conversion.
       - Table/List of Collaborations:
         - 公测同步开启联动 (Launch sync): 杖剑传说 x 蔬菜精灵 (Vegetable Fairy)
         - 公测2个月后 (2 months post-launch): 杖剑传说 x 为美好的世界献上祝福 (KonoSuba)
         - 公测4个月后 (4 months post-launch): 杖剑传说 x 洛天依 x 言和 (Luo Tianyi x Yanhe)

   - **Social & Retention Systems:** How independent idle play contrasts with team-dependent high-yield dungeons, fostering a "veteran carry" culture and guild-based social belonging that drives retention and revenue.

   - **Specific Collaborations & Timelines:** A chronological list of partnerships post-public beta: 蔬菜精灵 (launch), 为美好的世界献上祝福 (2 months), 洛天依 x 言和 (4 months), and 罗小黑战记2 (6 months).

response_text:
This section answers retrieval queries regarding the mobile game 《杖剑传说》, structured around the following dimensions:

- **Topics & Definitions:** Explains the “放置为表、MMO为里” (idle surface, MMO core) design philosophy, defining how vertical idle progression and light exploration/puzzle mechanics lower daily engagement barriers while embedding traditional MMORPG depth.
- **Entities & Dates:** Identifies the game 《杖剑传说》 and its post-public-beta IP collaboration timeline: 蔬菜精灵 (launch sync), 为美好的世界献上祝福 (2 months post-launch), 洛天依 x 言和 (4 months post-launch), and 罗小黑战记2 (6 months post-launch). Notes the game has been in public beta for over half a year.
- **Procedures & Mechanics:** Details gameplay loops including semi-real-time command queue combat, pre-configuration of 8 active/passive skills, equipment affix BD (build) construction, and the social progression path (independent idle grinding → team-dependent high-yield dungeons → guild participation → “veteran carry” culture).
- **Claims & Metrics:** Asserts that MMO-style collaborative social systems are the primary drivers of player retention and revenue. Claims the pure 2D art style ensures high compatibility with ACG IPs, enabling rapid content deployment and effective fan conversion. Cites metrics: average collab frequency of every 2 months, 8 skill slots, and hundreds of skill combinations ensuring long-term explorability.
- **Tables/Figures & Evidence Types:** Presents a chronological collaboration timeline table/figure mapping IP names to rollout intervals. Evidence is categorized as analytical industry research and gameplay feature breakdown, sourced from 点点数据 (DianDian Data) self-research and visualization.
